chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–1047 of 2024 (Farhan Qaiser Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.4826/2024. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 23.08.2024 Mr. Rehan Kayani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he has been informed that the name of the petitioner has been deleted from the Exit Control List; hence he has been asked not to press this petition. Dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
